| [Anatomical terms of neuroanatomy](/wiki/Anatomical_terms_of_neuroanatomy "Anatomical terms of neuroanatomy") [[edit on Wikidata](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q7234223 "d:Q7234223")] | |

The **posterior nucleus of the hypothalamus** is one of the many [nuclei](/wiki/Nucleus_(neuroanatomy) "Nucleus (neuroanatomy)") that make up the [hypothalamic](/wiki/Hypothalamus "Hypothalamus") region of the [brain](/wiki/Brain "Brain").

Its functions include elevation of [blood pressure](/wiki/Blood_pressure "Blood pressure"), [pupillary dilation](/wiki/Pupillary_dilation "Pupillary dilation"), and [shivering](/wiki/Shivering "Shivering") or body heat conservation ([thermoregulation](/wiki/Thermoregulation "Thermoregulation")).[[1]](#cite_note-1)
Damage or destruction of this nucleus causes hypothermia. Descending efferents from the nucleus synapse on the sympathetic neurons of the spinal cord, which exist in the thoracic and lumbar regions in the lateral horns. A recent study showed that a subset of neurons in this brain area are involved in the generation of panic-like defensive state in mice.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

[Paraventricular](/wiki/Paraventricular_nucleus_of_hypothalamus "Paraventricular nucleus of hypothalamus")   + [Magnocellular neurosecretory cell](/wiki/Magnocellular_neurosecretory_cell "Magnocellular neurosecretory cell")   + [Parvocellular neurosecretory cell](/wiki/Parvocellular_neurosecretory_cell "Parvocellular neurosecretory cell") * [Supraoptic](/wiki/Supraoptic_nucleus "Supraoptic nucleus")   + [oxytocin](/wiki/Oxytocin "Oxytocin")/[vasopressin](/wiki/Vasopressin "Vasopressin")  * *other:* [Arcuate (dopamine/GHRH)](/wiki/Arcuate_nucleus_(hypothalamus) "Arcuate nucleus (hypothalamus)") * [Preoptic (GnRH)](/wiki/Preoptic_area "Preoptic area") * [Suprachiasmatic (melatonin)](/wiki/Suprachiasmatic_nucleus "Suprachiasmatic nucleus") | | [Emotion](/wiki/Emotion "Emotion") | * [Lateral](/wiki/Lateral_hypothalamus "Lateral hypothalamus") * [Ventromedial](/wiki/Ventromedial_nucleus "Ventromedial nucleus") * [Dorsomedial](/wiki/Dorsomedial_hypothalamic_nucleus "Dorsomedial hypothalamic nucleus") | | | [White matter](/wiki/White_matter "White matter") | * *afferent*   + [Stria terminalis](/wiki/Stria_terminalis "Stria terminalis")   + [Medial forebrain bundle](/wiki/Medial_forebrain_bundle "Medial forebrain bundle")   + [Retinohypothalamic tract](/wiki/Retinohypothalamic_tract "Retinohypothalamic tract") * *efferent*   + [Mammillothalamic tract](/wiki/Mammillothalamic_tract "Mammillothalamic tract")   + [Dorsal longitudinal fasciculus](/wiki/Dorsal_longitudinal_fasciculus "Dorsal longitudinal fasciculus") | | [Pituitary](/wiki/Pituitary_gland "Pituitary gland") | * [Posterior](/wiki/Posterior_pituitary "Posterior pituitary") is diencephalon, but [anterior](/wiki/Anterior_pituitary "Anterior pituitary") is glandular | |
